description: A client with an aging firewall wants a quote to replace it with a new, next-generation model.

nodes.task_description: Review the client's existing firewall configuration to understand the complexity (number of rules, VPNs, etc.).

expected_outcome.value: The sales engineer has a full understanding of the current configuration that needs to be migrated.

nodes.task_description: Recommend a suitable next-generation firewall model that meets the client's needs.

expected_outcome.value: A specific firewall model is recommended.

nodes.task_description: Create a quote that includes the cost of the hardware, software licenses, and the professional services hours to configure and install it.

expected_outcome.value: A comprehensive quote is created and sent to the client.
